description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. Add a FunctionalTest job in the test stage that uses the python:3.6 image, runs a before_script that adds the Google Chrome apt key, adds the Chrome repository, installs pip requirements, runs Django makemigrations and migrate, updates apt and installs unzip, google-chrome-stable, xvfb, downloads and unzips chromedriver 2.32, collects static files and starts the server in background, then executes python manage.py test; this job is excluded from the master branch and runs only on_success. Add a UnitTest job also in the test stage with the same before_script, then runs coverage run --include='company_forum/*','company_jobs/*','company_profile/*','company_login/*','main/*' manage.py test followed by coverage report -m, also on_success. Finally, add a Deployment job in the deploy stage that uses the ruby:2.4 image, installs dpl via gem and the Heroku CLI via the official install script in before_script, sets the production environment with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST, then runs dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY, exports HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY, and runs heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate to deploy to Heroku.
